name: Evans Law Offices
description_short: California bankruptcy and family law firm offering Chapter 7, Chapter 13, and divorce services with 37+ years combined attorney experience.
description_long:
Evans Law Offices is a law firm based in California (with offices indicated by phone numbers in 408, 831, and 916 area codes) specializing in bankruptcy and family law matters. The firm's primary service areas are Santa Clara, Monterey, and Santa Cruz counties. According to their website, they have been serving clients for many years and emphasize their bankruptcy expertise alongside family law practice.

The firm offers a comprehensive range of bankruptcy services including Chapter 7 bankruptcy, Chapter 13 bankruptcy, Chapter 11 reorganization, business closure and corporate Chapter 7, debt negotiation and settlement, foreclosure stopping, garnishment and levy stopping, and tax-related bankruptcy matters. In family law, they provide divorce representation, child custody and support services, spousal support negotiation, prenuptial and postnuptial agreements, and domestic violence/restraining order assistance. They also address the intersection of divorce and bankruptcy.

Evans Law Offices distinguishes itself through its stated combination of bankruptcy specialization and family law expertise under lead attorney Brette, who is described as a bankruptcy specialist. The firm emphasizes personal attention to each case and team-based representation alongside clients. Their website features multiple client testimonials praising specific attorneys by name (Brette and Dave) for compassionate representation during difficult financial and personal circumstances.

A key limitation is that the website provides no information about fees, payment plans, initial consultation costs, or specific outcomes/success rates. While testimonials are present, they are brief and lack specific details about case results. No credentials, bar admission details, or formal qualifications beyond "over 37 years combined experience" are verified on the provided website content.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Serves dual expertise in bankruptcy AND family law, addressing cases involving both financial and divorce issues
Advertises 37+ years of combined attorney experience in bankruptcy and family law matters
Offers multiple bankruptcy chapter options (7, 11, 13) including business bankruptcy and corporate closure
Provides specific garnishment, levy, and foreclosure stopping services beyond basic bankruptcy filing
Available across three California regions (Santa Clara, Monterey, Santa Cruz counties) with multiple phone lines
Website includes client testimonials praising named attorneys for compassionate representation
cons: No fee information, pricing structure, or payment plan details disclosed on website
No specific case outcomes, success rates, or statistics provided to validate claims
Client testimonials are generic and lack substantive detail about case results or settlement amounts
No information about attorney credentials, bar certifications, or formal qualifications beyond combined experience claim
No details on initial consultation process, timeline for case resolution, or what to expect
best_for: California residents in Santa Clara, Monterey, or Santa Cruz counties facing bankruptcy with concurrent divorce or family law issues
Individuals seeking to stop foreclosure, wage garnishment, or tax liens through bankruptcy protection
Business owners considering Chapter 11 reorganization or corporate Chapter 7 closure
diagnosis: Evans Law Offices is best for California consumers in specific counties (Santa Clara, Monterey, Santa Cruz) who face bankruptcy and simultaneously have family law needs like divorce or custody issues. The primary caveat is that no fee structure, case outcomes, or attorney credentials are disclosed on their website, requiring direct contact to evaluate costs and actual qualifications before engagement.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 255 N Market St #110, San Jose, CA 95110
